textByHashes.2505e27e9435509b180a4a841736ddcc6ae36c36: Well... Maybe I will if you help me with something.
textByHashes.9ae446c60d097b7edf1945d1a32fc36b1f52b8d5: I have lost my recent good find.
textByHashes.3553e095b8302b6629488f516ff202b682fd19b1: It was around here for sure. Maybe someone picked it up?
textByHashes.4833a0b7418458210c211488a7eb61b7cc051ead: Very well thanks. Have you found my animal skull yet?
textByHashes.8e64d1567ba30eeefe678044ed0170511ba9fa7f: Oh well, I am sure it's been picked up. Couldn't you try looking through some pockets?
textByHashes.b4150b3091c6e8c93977940681244f9ca004e517: Oh wow! You've found it! Thank you so much. I'll be glad to tell you what I know about the exam.
textByHashes.879c04467a712cad3535bc17cb46ac965d4092fe: The study of Earth Sciences is: The study of the earth, its contents and history.
textByHashes.a99aa95d74b6e3d645b7a46c9018e114811a204a: Well ok, this is what I have learned since I last spoke to you...
textByHashes.27f12f4b7f1323de832974d6aec9e0b22c3efa63: I can if you help me...
textByHashes.482113f3e4bb80f3d8bc29d026111e0d1844ea89: I have lost my teddy bear. He was my lucky mascot.
textByHashes.7b71e690ecff0efeb1b035d6b53bc3b0bafc9ab0: Well, I was doing a lot of walking that day... Oh yes, that's right - we were studying ceramics in fact, near the edge of the digsite.
textByHashes.8278e366edf3904f91b6bcabdb6d5f268e2d2638: I found some pottery that seemed to match the design on those large urns.
textByHashes.4c0f5a93c59d200bdb159b1252629fb2bef7ab6c: I was in the process of checking this out, and when we got back to the centre my lucky mascot had gone!
textByHashes.59a7879e9d1e0c4066e4aba3a04ddef4639b2f53: Very well thanks. Have you found my lucky mascot yet?
textByHashes.0e45cfb73b034aa7ded2bc80330fe10ba458329f: I'm sure it's just outside the digsite somewhere...
textByHashes.e9e1575f3770e4b85994f319fe82cd8c9095bd14: Hey! My lucky mascot! Thanks ever so much. Let me help you with those questions now.
textByHashes.dddf3b5d57275d21c3d0af5f0b3313417bca218d: The proper health and safety points are: Leather gloves and boots to be worn at all times; proper tools must be used.
textByHashes.fb0460e0088420606906f4dede9b1fc5a5ca47ed: Okay, I'll tell you my latest notes...
textByHashes.a33bc7506fad32674bc439eaffda13a48606183b: I can't do anything unless I find my special cup.
textByHashes.d91b7501b9e2b615350868fa9618044bfa191453: My special cup. I won it for a particularly good find last month.
textByHashes.5556c6aa9e1e901c18bda1684e9951a73b2698be: All I remember is that I was working near the tents when I lost it.
textByHashes.228e1156db0e5f2ec57f673047dfee7e03511aaa: Oh dear, I hope it didn't fall into the stream; I might never find it again.
textByHashes.11abb79150e6a6c653ae76eae2dc99c20758370b: Excellent! I'm so happy. Let me now help you with your exams...
textByHashes.309a56370e52cc42c2615dcc35b7eef2a7cd2392: The people eligible to use the digsite are: All that have passed the appropriate Earth Sciences exams.
textByHashes.580b1e792ac552c43d489f905d1e57c9843a3385: Hey, I'll tell you what I've learned. That may help.
textByHashes.db143395da2c92479313e8e8728cb8ef595d34cb: Correct rock pick usage: Always handle with care; strike the rock cleanly on its cleaving point.
textByHashes.ecf521795fff4ed1f51ae5c9ef38b40be7279a41: Finds handling: Finds must be carefully handled, and gloves worn.
textByHashes.0ae0df11c745ec2ab6313e2f1b5d9d08276e8acb: Correct sample transportation: Samples taken in rough form; kept only in sealed containers.
textByHashes.9392b66932eda50c497e9a427fffb41bc2fbc341: Specimen brush use: Brush carefully and slowly using short strokes.
textByHashes.1ed3c27eed113b07102a4640d63625d9a9ca17c2: Well... It's going to cost you...
textByHashes.97e4cd2f91a1c6aecf4f3e583e48b8740efefdde: I'll tell you what I would like: a precious stone. I don't find many of them. My favourites are opals; they are beautiful.
textByHashes.301ffb93671538ad98c40626d77e3fa6d8ec791d: Just like me! Tee hee hee!
textByHashes.59df84c2a80e1cd3669b78d432171039023f52aa: Well, I have seen people get them from panning occasionally.
textByHashes.b3dc2dfab9e7aacf6ed1a565390b8b490263c6fa: Oh, hi again. Did you bring me the opal?
textByHashes.75cf8e70b3704505e9d87cf98953dec758adb66f: Oh well, tell me when you do. Remember that they can be found around the digsite; perhaps try panning the river.
textByHashes.f5810043e423a89e6458034c810265a4f8897cdd: Wow, great, you've found one. This will look beautiful set in my necklace. Thanks for that; now I'll tell you what I know...
textByHashes.840ad44c449555b42483bf5de39e242324d0eab8: Sample preparation: Samples cleaned, and carried only in specimen jars.
textByHashes.7c68e1154075226dae30cb4822794adc327135fa: The proper technique for handling bones is: Handle bones carefully and keep them away from other samples.
textByHashes.06ee566c260093413d68a75a66c6e3fe2049d420: Oh, hi again. News of your find has spread fast; you are quite famous around here now.
textByHashes.874332c9f30fe0f713dc02faf0e29dc1a0d14691: Hey it's the great explorer! Thanks a lot for the help earlier!
textByHashes.dd2c0ca82e4381ac321128ddf83e5a39d55e81b5: Hi there! Thanks again. Hey, maybe I'll be asking you for help next time. It seems you are something of an expert now!
